# Dizees - Digital Products Platform

## Project Overview
Dizees is a personal digital products platform built with Next.js 14 App Router and Tailwind CSS. This is a personal project for selling digital products, not a production app for general use.

## Theme Configuration
- Primary Color: Dark green (#064E3B)
- Background: White
- Headings: Dark green
- Text: Black
- Border Radius: rounded-2xl
- Design Style: Modern, clean UI with proper spacing and shadows

## Project Structure
- `/` - Home page with navbar, hero section, and product preview cards
- `/dashboard` - Analytics dashboard with dummy statistics
- `/products` - Product grid layout
- `/products/productivity` - Individual product page

## Development Guidelines
- Use Next.js 14 App Router
- Implement reusable components
- Follow consistent spacing and shadow patterns
- Use Tailwind CSS utility classes
- Keep UI clean and modern
